start.welcome: 🇺🇸🍽️ Welcome to the Build a Zoo bot for sending notifications about Stock and Totems!
start.choose_language: 🇺🇸🗯️Select the language in which you will receive notifications:
start.welcome_menu: 👋 Welcome! Use the buttons below to navigate.

subscription.require:
To receive notifications, subscribe to the group:
👉 @buildazoo_chat
After subscribing, click the button:
subscription.not_subscribed:
❌ You are not subscribed to the group yet.
Subscribe and click the button again.
👉 @buildazoo_chat
subscription.confirmed:
✅ Subscription confirmed!
Now configure which notifications you want to receive:

🥝 Food - select fruits for which you want to receive notifications
🗿 Free - Notifications about free totems
🗿💎 Paid - Notifications about paid totems (payment is usually specified in the text with a link to the totem, and it indicates who to send it to; most often it's a person near the food shop. If you're slow and don't send it in time, the person might block you)

settings.title:
⚙️ Notification settings:
Now configure which notifications you want to receive:

🥝 Food - select fruits for which you want to receive notifications
🗿 Free - Notifications about free totems
🗿💎 Paid - Notifications about paid totems (payment is usually specified in the text with a link to the totem, and it indicates who to send it to; most often it's a person near the food shop. If you're slow and don't send it in time, the person might block you)
settings.no_fruits_selected: ℹ️ You haven't selected any fruits. Food notifications will not be sent.
settings.notifications_disabled:
✅ All notifications disabled!
To enable again — click «🔔 Notifications»

help.text: 📖 Bot Help 🔔 Notifications — configure which notifications to receive 🥝 Food — choose fruits you want to be notified about 🗿 Totems — free and paid totems 🎒 Inventory — your items and pets 🔄 Trade — trade items with other players ❓ For questions, contact an administrator.

notifications.unsubscribed:
❌ You have unsubscribed from the required group. Notifications suspended.
Subscribe again and click 'Check subscription'.

common.error: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again later.

admin.broadcast_completed: ✅ Broadcast completed! Sent {success} out of {total} messages.

trade.enter_own_nick: 🎮 Enter your Roblox nickname (e.g. @MyNick or just MyNick):
trade.enter_own_nick_cancel:
🎮 Enter your Roblox nickname (e.g. @MyNick or just MyNick):

To cancel: /cancel
trade.nick_saved_enter_partner: ✅ Nickname saved: @{nick} Specify the second trade participant: • Forward any message from them • Or enter their @username / Telegram ID
trade.enter_partner: 🎮 Your Roblox nickname: @{nick} Specify the second trade participant: • Forward any message from them • Or enter their @username / Telegram ID To cancel: /cancel
trade.partner_not_found:
❌ User not found or has never started the bot.

Share this link: {link}
trade.partner_not_found_username:
❌ User @{username} not found.
Make sure they have started the bot at least once.

Try forwarding their message or entering their Telegram ID.
trade.partner_no_nick: ⏳ The second participant hasn't set their Roblox nickname yet. They have been notified — the trade will start automatically once they enter it.
trade.trade_started: 🔄 Trade started! Send messages — they will be forwarded to the other participant. ⏳ An administrator will join shortly.
trade.admin_joined: 👑 An administrator has joined the conversation.
trade.trade_ended: ✅ Trade completed. Messages are no longer being forwarded.
trade.enter_nick_for_trade: ⚠️ You have been invited to a trade! First, enter your Roblox nickname (e.g. @MyNick):
trade.enter_nick_text_only: ❌ Please enter your nickname as text.
trade.cannot_trade_self: ❌ You cannot start a trade with yourself.
trade.user_not_registered:
❌ This user is not registered in the bot yet.

Send them this link to register: {link}
trade.partner_needs_nick:
🔄 User {link} is inviting you to a trade!

First, enter your Roblox nickname (e.g. @MyNick):

To cancel: /cancel
trade.request_sent_waiting_nick:
✅ Request sent to the user.
Waiting for them to set their Roblox nickname — the trade will start automatically.
trade.confirm_request: 🔄 Trade request User {link} (Roblox: {nick}) wants to start a trade with you. Accept?
trade.request_sent_waiting_confirm:
✅ Trade request sent to user {link}.
Waiting for confirmation...
trade.trade_data_expired: ❌ Trade data has expired. Please try again.
trade.partner_ended: ❌ The other participant has ended the trade.
trade.completed_by_admin: ✅ Trade completed. Thank you for using the service!
trade.user_hidden_forwarding:
❌ Could not identify the user — they have hidden their forwarding info.

Ask them to send you their @username or Telegram ID directly.
trade.user_not_identified:
❌ Could not identify the user.
Forward their message or enter @username / Telegram ID.

inventory.title: 🎒 Inventory:
inventory.pickup_sent: ✅ Pickup request sent to the administrator.
inventory.add_pet_prompt: 📸 Send photos of your pets to add them to your inventory.
inventory.add_pet_received: ✅ Photos received! An administrator will contact you.
inventory.how_many_to_take: 🎒 How many to take? Item: {name} Available: {max_qty} Enter a number from 1 to {max_qty} or all for full pickup. To cancel — /cancel
inventory.enter_qty_error: ❌ Enter a number from 1 to {max_qty} or 'all'
inventory.request_sent:
✅ Request sent to administrators!
Please wait, they will contact you.
inventory.items_given:
✅ Administrator has given you the items!
They have been removed from your inventory.
inventory.photo_received: ✅ Photo received! The administrator will contact you to add the pet to your inventory.
inventory.pet_added_notification: 🎒 Administrator added a pet to your inventory: {full_name}
inventory.food_added_notification:
🎒 Administrator added food to your inventory:
{summary}
inventory.item_added_notification: 🎒 Administrator added an item to your inventory: {name}

item_trade.already_active: ⚠️ You already have an active trade. Finish or cancel it first.
item_trade.inventory_empty: 🎒 Your inventory is empty — nothing to offer.
item_trade.start_text: 🔄 Item Trade Specify your trade partner: • Forward any message from them • Or enter @username / Telegram ID To cancel: /cancel
item_trade.user_not_found: ❌ User not found. Try again or /cancel
item_trade.partner_not_registered: ❌ This user is not registered in the bot yet.
item_trade.partner_has_active: ❌ This user already has an active trade. Try later.
item_trade.invitation_sent: ✅ Invitation sent to {partner}. Waiting for response…
item_trade.invite_text: 🔄 Trade invitation {init} wants to trade inventory items with you. Accept the trade?
item_trade.partner_accepted: ✅ {partner} accepted the trade! Now select the items you want to offer.
item_trade.select_items: 🎒 Select items to trade: Mark what you want to offer your partner.
item_trade.partner_finished_selecting: ℹ️ {partner} finished selecting items. Now proceed to confirm the trade.
item_trade.partner_confirmed: ℹ️ {user} confirmed the trade. Your turn!
item_trade.trade_success_notify: ✅ Trade with {partner} completed! Items added to your inventory.
item_trade.partner_editing: ✏️ {user} is editing their offer. Confirmations reset.

giveaway.winner_notification: 🎉 Congratulations! You won {i} place in the giveaway! 🎁 Your prizes:
giveaway.not_registered: ❌ You are not registered in the bot. Send /start to the bot in private messages.
giveaway.already_participating: ✅ You are already participating in this giveaway!
giveaway.joined_success: 🎉 You have successfully joined the giveaway!
